title: Cobblemon: Mandom's Shiny Alts.
description: a Cobblemon resource pack that includes my take on some Shiny Pokemon.
body:
Just a little thing i made for fun. I might do other Pokemon in the future.

![House from House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a766bfef772a966ddbe64f32eebb19f163af3784.png)

Current Pokemons right now:
- Chimchar
- Monferno
- Infernape
- Starly
- Staravia
- Staraptor
- Gible
- Gabite
- Garchomp
- Scraggy
- Scrafty
- Golett
- Golurk
